name: Boa Hancock (OP01-078) (Reprint)
subtypes: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
effect_text: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)[DON!! x1] [When Attacking]/[On Block] Draw 1 card if you have 5 or less cards in your hand.Disclaimer: This card was reprinted from the original set with changes to the artist credit (note the lack of pen symbol next to the artist name).
